---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages, screenshots, etc.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 121]
- App version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Deployment: [e.g. local docker / Azure VM]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Links to related issues or PRs.
